name: TestAddValueTableEntry
title: TestAddValueTableEntry
syntax: TestAddStringTableEntry(long handle, char[] value, dword isDefaultIndex);
TestAddValueTableEntry(long handle, double value, dword isDefaultIndex);
description: This functions adds a new value table entry.

parameters.name: Value
parameters.description: The value should be added to the dialog table.

parameters.name: IsDefaultIndex
parameters.description: If isDefaultIndex = 0 this Entry will be set as default.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
